module.name: API Integration Demo
module.author: System
module.description: Demonstrates credential management and the call_api() HTTP client. Provides a route to test API calls and a script that shows how to use get_credential() with call_api() for external integrations.

scripts.script:
# API Integration Demo — test page # Lists credentials and provides an interactive API test form from sqlalchemy import text as _sql # Find credentials belonging to this module module = db.session.query(Module).filter_by(slug='api-integration-demo').first() creds = [] if module: creds = db.session.query(Credential).filter_by(module_id=module.id).all() cred_rows = '' for c in creds: masked = c.credential_type[:4] + '****' if c.value_encrypted else '****' cred_rows += f'{c.name}{c.credential_type}{c.description or "-"}' _result = f""" API Integration Test

API Integration Test

Module Credentials

Credentials are encrypted at rest and module-scoped. Create them at Credentials admin.

{cred_rows if cred_rows else ''}
NameTypeDescription
No credentials defined yet. Create one from the Credentials admin.

Test API Call

Enter a URL and optional headers to test the call_api() helper with retry logic.

Usage Examples

# In any module script:
token = get_credential('my_api_key')
result = call_api('GET', 'https://api.example.com/data',
    headers={{'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + token}},
    retries=3, backoff=2)
if result['status_code'] == 200:
    print('Got', len(result['body']), 'items')
else:
    print('Error:', result.get('error'))
""" """.replace('{{', '{').replace('}}', '}')

# API Integration Demo — API call handler # Executes a test API call using call_api() and returns the result import json as _json if request.method != 'POST': _result = 'Method not allowed' else: method = request.form.get('method', 'GET') url = request.form.get('url', '').strip() headers_raw = request.form.get('headers', '').strip() body_raw = request.form.get('body', '').strip() timeout = int(request.form.get('timeout', 15)) retries = int(request.form.get('retries', 1)) if not url: _result = '
Error: URL is required
' return headers = None if headers_raw: try: headers = _json.loads(headers_raw) except _json.JSONDecodeError as e: _result = f'
Invalid headers JSON: {e}
' return body_data = None json_body = None if body_raw: try: json_body = _json.loads(body_raw) except _json.JSONDecodeError: body_data = body_raw result = call_api( method=method, url=url, headers=headers, json=json_body, data=body_data, timeout=timeout, retries=retries, ) status_color = '#080' if 200 <= result['status_code'] < 300 else '#c00' body_display = result.get('body', '') if isinstance(body_display, (dict, list)): body_display = _json.dumps(body_display, indent=2) elif len(str(body_display)) > 5000: body_display = str(body_display)[:5000] + '\n\n... (truncated)' error_display = result.get('error', '') error_section = '' if error_display: error_section = f'

Error

{error_display}
' _result = f""" API Result

API Call Result

URL{url}
Method{method}
Status{result['status_code']}
Duration{result.get('elapsed_ms', '?')}ms
{error_section}

Response

{body_display}

← Back to test page

"""
